hero.title: Steering Engineering Association
hero.subtitle: The voice of the student, the spirit of engineering, and the future of innovation.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The Steering Engineering Association is a student organization dedicated to representing engineering students and enhancing their university experience through events, initiatives, and academic and social support. We work to build a strong, collaborative student community that contributes to developing students' skills and achieving their academic and professional goals.

initiatives.title: Initiatives
initiatives.subtitle: Discover the initiatives and events organized by the association to enhance the student experience at the Faculty of Engineering.

initiative1.title: Sports & Cultural Events
initiative1.desc: Creating an incubator environment for students' talents and interests, while fostering friendly competition among them.

initiative2.title: Professional Workshop Series
initiative2.desc: The association organizes a series of workshops focused on professional skill development, such as resume writing, interview preparation, and effective communication.

initiative3.title: Social Initiatives
initiative3.desc: Hosting activities and events aimed at strengthening social bonds and promoting collaboration.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We would love to hear from you.

blogsPage.subtitle: News, updates, and stories from the student community.

media.name: Media Secretariat
media.desc: The secretariat dedicated to highlighting the association's identity and communicating its activities and initiatives creatively. It reflects the true image of the student environment and contributes to building effective communication with the university community and the outside world. It strives to create professional media content that expresses the spirit of the college, enhances its institutional presence, and acts as an incubator to develop its members' skills using the latest media technologies.

academic.name: Academic Secretariat
academic.desc: The fundamental pillar concerned with supporting and enriching the educational journey of engineering students and overcoming academic obstacles. It also creates an integrated environment that goes beyond the classroom to develop research and practical skills, aiming for university and professional academic excellence.

sports.name: Sports Secretariat
sports.desc: Responsible for activating and consolidating physical and mental culture within the college community. It manages all sports activities, directly supervises the teams representing the college in university tournaments, and spreads awareness about the importance of physical activity as an integral part of the quality of university life.

external.name: External Relations
external.desc: The interface that connects engineering students to the academic and professional world beyond the university's borders. It seeks to create real opportunities for students through partnerships with universities, international organizations, and professional institutions, as well as providing scholarships, internships, and developmental events to build a strong career path early on.

cultural.name: Cultural Secretariat
cultural.desc: The creative incubator that aims to enrich the university life experience by creating interactive spaces that bring students together around the values of art, literature, and knowledge. It serves as an umbrella organizing the work of specialized clubs, seeking to foster a sense of belonging and solidify free expression skills, acting as a bridge connecting the engineering community with its cultural surroundings.

social.name: Social Secretariat
social.desc: The human and service pillar of the association, promoting values of solidarity and cooperation within the college community. It works to improve the university environment both materially and morally through its various offices, contributing to the support of students in need and providing a conducive study environment governed by responsibility and synergy.

financial.name: Financial Secretariat
financial.desc: Responsible for the complete supervision of financial resources and controlling incoming and outgoing cash flows. It aims to ensure the highest levels of transparency through budget preparation and accounting schedules, in addition to developing strategies to grow the association's financial resources to ensure the continuity of its activities.

general.name: General Secretariat
general.desc: Considered the beating heart of the Steering Engineering Association. It is responsible for coordinating between the various secretariats and the executive committee presidency, organizing relationships between departments, and approving their plans and programs. It is the most dynamic body, working to turn organizational visions into a cohesive institutional reality.
